case_title: PRIMUS AUTO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS. SUNDAI M BROWN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF GLORIA ZARCO IN OPPOS TO OSC FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMUS AUTO FINANCIAL SERVICES
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-27-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIMUS AUTO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, SUNDAI M AKA SUNDAI BROWN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-20-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-05-2003
